text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 ISNA: An Iranian parliamentary official reports that Iran is focusing on strengthening the national currency, the rial by strengthening control over the Strait of Hormuz, with current revenue estimates at between $10 billion and $15 billion annually. Under the proposal, foreign vessels could be required to settle payments through offices in Iran or via Iranian-linked banking systems in the region, a move intended to bolster demand for the rial. The official said the plan aims to give Iran a regulatory role in the strategic waterway, stressing that the intention is not to disrupt shipping or engage in extortion. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 ISNA：一位伊朗议会官员报告称，伊朗正致力于通过加强对霍尔木兹海峡的控制来巩固本国货币里亚尔，目前估计年收入在100亿至150亿美元之间。根据该提案，外国船只可能被要求通过伊朗境内的办事处或该地区与伊朗有关联的银行系统进行结算，此举旨在提振对里亚尔的需求。该官员表示，该计划旨在让伊朗在这一战略水道中发挥监管作用，并强调其目的并非干扰航运或进行勒索。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇮🇹 Süddeutsche Zeitung : Germany is prepared to participate in an international mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz, focusing on mine‑clearing and maritime reconnaissance. German Chancellor Friedrich Merz will present the offer at a meeting in Paris with French President Macron and British Prime Minister Starmer, also attended by Italy’s Meloni. The Bundeswehr would contribute ten specialised mine‑hunting vessels (Type MJ332) and use its logistics base in Djibouti for reconnaissance. German participation requires a prior end to hostilities, an international mission, a UN mandate (preferably) and Bundestag approval. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇮🇹 《南德意志报》：德国准备参与一项旨在确保霍尔木兹海峡安全的国际任务，重点是扫雷和海上侦察。德国总理弗里德里希·默茨（Friedrich Merz）将在巴黎与法国总统马克龙、英国首相斯塔默以及意大利总理梅洛尼举行的会议上提出这一提议。德国联邦国防军将提供十艘专业扫雷舰（MJ332型），并利用其在吉布提的后勤基地进行侦察。德国的参与需要以敌对行动结束、国际任务、联合国授权（最好）以及联邦议院批准为前提。@wfwitness

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. forces are focused, vigilant, and highly motivated as they execute a blockade on vessels attempting to enter or exit Iranian ports. text: 🇪🇺 🏁 "Today with NATO Secretary General we took stock of our common work to bolster European defence and continue support to Ukraine. We discussed the upcoming NATO Summit and how we can upscale defence industrial output in Europe. We need to invest more, to produce more and to do both faster. With the rise in global security threats, we agreed to work closely together in the next weeks to strengthen the EU-NATO relationship and prepare a successful Summit in Ankara." - Die Leyenführerin 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🏁 “今天，我与北约秘书长共同评估了我们在加强欧洲防御和继续支持乌克兰方面的共同工作。我们讨论了即将举行的北约峰会，以及我们如何提高欧洲的国防工业产出。我们需要投入更多，生产更多，并且更快地完成这两项工作。随着全球安全威胁的增加，我们同意在未来几周内密切合作，加强欧盟与北约的关系，并为在安卡拉举行的成功峰会做好准备。” - 冯德莱恩 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Iran has moved about 9 million barrels of crude from floating storage in the Gulf of Oman since the U.S. naval blockade began on April 13. Source
text_zh: 自4月13日美国海军封锁开始以来，伊朗已从阿曼湾的浮动储油设施中运走了约900万桶原油。来源

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Etienne_Marcuz : FINALLY ! A French Rafale seen taking off from Istres air base with a rocket pod under its wing, most probably in order to test a low cost solution for drone hunting mission. 📸 via @Bruno_Aviation https://twitter.com/Etienne_Marcuz/status/2044760629114802425/photo/1 Un Rafale équipé de roquettes guidées laser aperçu à Istres. Les essais ont donc enfin démarré. Ici une nacelle Thalès JF12, donc 24 roquettes 68mm au total. Une corde de plus à l'arc du Rafale, la chasse au Shahed est OUVERTE ! https://twitter.com/Bruno_Aviation/status/2044743272363376680/photo/1 - bruno aviation tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @Etienne_Marcuz : 终于！一架法国阵风战斗机被拍到从伊斯特尔空军基地起飞，机翼下挂载着火箭弹吊舱，很可能是为了测试一种用于无人机狩猎任务的低成本解决方案。📸 via @Bruno_Aviation https://twitter.com/Etienne_Marcuz/status/2044760629114802425/photo/1 一架配备激光制导火箭弹的阵风战斗机在伊斯特尔被发现。测试终于开始了。这里是一个泰雷兹JF12吊舱，总共24枚68毫米火箭弹。阵风战斗机的又一项新技能，猎杀“见证者”无人机的行动开始了！ https://twitter.com/Bruno_Aviation/status/2044743272363376680/photo/1 - bruno aviation 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @TankerTrackers : BREAKING; VISUAL CONFIRMATION: IRAN HAS SHIPPED OUT NINE MILLION BARRELS OF CRUDE OIL FROM FLOATING STORAGE IN THE GULF OF OMAN SINCE THE US BLOCKADE WENT INTO EFFECT ON 2026-04-13 AT 14:00 UTC ANOTHER TWO MILLION BARRELS DEPARTED ON 2026-04-12 #OOTT #IranWar #Tankers tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @TankerTrackers : 突发；视觉确认：自美国封锁于2026年4月13日14:00 UTC生效以来，伊朗已从阿曼湾的浮动储油设施中运出了900万桶原油。另有200万桶于2026年4月12日离港 #OOTT #IranWar #Tankers 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @RALee85 : "Vadym Skibitskyi, the deputy head of Ukraine’s defence intelligence directorate, known by its acronym GUR, told the FT in an interview in Kyiv on Friday that Russian forces were stepping up ballistic missile strikes on Ukrainian cities. Moscow is producing about 60 Iskander missiles a month and has expanded its launcher capacity, while Ukraine lacks sufficient advanced air-defence systems such as the US-made Patriot system to cover the entire country, Skibitskyi said. He warned that critical infrastructure, especially energy facilities badly damaged by Russia’s winter air-strike campaign that brought the country close to catastrophe, remains highly vulnerable as a result while Moscow refines its strike tactics... Russia is readying a fresh ground assault in south-eastern Ukraine, dipping into its strategic reserve to add 20,000 fresh troops to its force inside the country, he said. With some 680,000 soldiers now on the ground, Russia is aiming to capture the entire Donbas region by September, he said, citing a GUR assessment shared with the FT." @ChristopherJM https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @RALee85 : “乌克兰国防情报局（GUR）副局长瓦季姆·斯基比茨基周五在基辅接受《金融时报》采访时表示，俄罗斯军队正在加强对乌克兰城市的弹道导弹袭击。斯基比茨基说，莫斯科每月生产约60枚伊斯坎德尔导弹，并扩大了发射装置产能，而乌克兰缺乏足够的先进防空系统（如美制爱国者系统）来覆盖全国。他警告说，由于莫斯科正在改进其打击战术，关键基础设施，特别是那些在俄罗斯冬季空袭行动中遭到严重破坏并使国家濒临灾难的能源设施，仍然非常脆弱……他说，俄罗斯正在乌克兰东南部准备新一轮地面进攻，动用其战略预备队向该国境内的部队增派了2万名新兵。他援引一份与《金融时报》分享的GUR评估报告称，目前地面上有约68万名士兵，俄罗斯的目标是在9月前占领整个顿巴斯地区。” @ChristopherJM https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816 推文

text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 🚀 🎯 乌克兰FPV自杀式无人机现在在“顿巴斯竞技场”上空行动，打击被占领的顿涅茨克的俄罗斯后勤设施——包括油罐车和军用货车——距离前线约50公里。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2044765051840606609/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel 570 Tankers. $400M a Day. And Iran Says It'll Sink Every Ship That Comes Close. Read the full report here: https://osint613news.beehiiv.com/p/570-tankers-400m-a-day-and-iran-says-it-ll-sink-every-ship-that-comes-close-deab tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 570艘油轮。每天4亿美元。而伊朗说它会击沉每一艘靠近的船只。在此阅读完整报告： https://osint613news.beehiiv.com/p/570-tankers-400m-a-day-and-iran-says-it-ll-sink-every-ship-that-comes-close-deab 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Lebanon’s presidential office confirmed a phone call between President Aoun and U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio. 📞 Aoun thanked Washington for its efforts and support in pursuing a ceasefire. 🔹 According to the presidency, Rubio reaffirmed his continued efforts to achieve a ceasefire, which would lay the foundation for peace, security, and stability in Lebanon. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统办公室确认了奥恩总统与美国国务卿马尔科·卢比奥之间的通话。📞 奥恩感谢华盛顿在寻求停火方面的努力和支持。🔹 据总统府称，卢比奥重申了他为实现停火所做的持续努力，这将为黎巴嫩的和平、安全与稳定奠定基础。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Q: There's reporting that China is preparing weapons shipments to Iran. What's your reaction? HEGSETH: President Trump has a very strong and direct relationship with President Xi. They communicated and China assured us that that is not going to happen https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044764083057041414/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 问：有报道称中国正在准备向伊朗运送武器。你的反应是什么？赫格塞斯：特朗普总统与习近平主席有着非常牢固和直接的关系。他们进行了沟通，中国向我们保证这种情况不会发生 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044764083057041414/video/1 推文

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳及周边对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇪🇸 Russia delivered a record volume of gas to Spain in the first month of the Middle East conflict, according to El País . Imports doubled compared to February, reaching an all-time high of nearly 10,000 GWh of Russian gas in a single month. Despite sanctions, the EU continues to allow Russian gas imports through at least 2027. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇪🇸 据《国家报》报道，在中东冲突的第一个月，俄罗斯向西班牙输送了创纪录的天然气量。进口量比2月份翻了一番，单月达到近100亿千瓦时的俄罗斯天然气，创下历史新高。尽管受到制裁，欧盟仍继续允许俄罗斯天然气进口，至少持续到2027年。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🛸 💥 🇮🇱 Hezbollah: Scenes from an operation in which the Islamic Resistance targeted an Israeli army Merkava tank in the town of Deir Seryan in southern Lebanon using an FPV drone. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🛸 💥 🇮🇱 真主党：伊斯兰抵抗组织使用FPV无人机在黎巴嫩南部代尔塞里安镇瞄准一辆以色列军队梅卡瓦坦克的行动现场。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: The Prime Minister and the Field Marshal of Pakistan are great people. They are close to Iran, and they are trying to work something out, and they are being very successful in doing that.
text_zh: 特朗普：巴基斯坦总理和陆军元帅都是伟大的人。他们与伊朗关系密切，正在努力达成某种协议，并且在这方面非常成功。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong: *Join Danny Haiphong LIVE today April 16th 12noon eastern 7pm CET w/ Larry Johnson!* Danny Haiphong and Larry Johnson discuss the latest developments in the Iran war, and how Iran and China have hit back against Trump’s Naval blockade.
